title: BONDING: A Publicly Deployed Multiplayer Chemistry Game

body.text: BONDING is P31 Labs' flagship artifact - a publicly deployed multiplayer chemistry game with 413 automated tests, built end-to-end by a single neurodivergent operator using AI as cognitive prosthetic.
This paper documents the development and deployment of BONDING as proof-of-concept for neurodivergent-designed assistive technology.
AI as cognitive prosthetic throughout development
413 automated tests aligned to NGSS standards
Open source repository with full documentation
Demonstrates that charitable-sector AI designed by the people it serves accelerates rather than replaces human judgment.
